title: Lesser & Pavey LP42488A Dinosaur Plate Tray, Melamine, 30 x 23 x 2cm
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES 1 Piece Vehicle Tray | 33x23x2 cm
COLORFUL DESIGN: This adorable Food tray features different Dinosaurs that will surely add excitement and pleasure to mealtime for your little boys.
PERFECT FOR ALL OCCASIONS: This adorable Food tray makes a wonderful present for little boys for any occasion. Best paired with Beaker, soup bowl, Plate and Cutlery set with the same design.
HIGH QUALITY: This adorable Food tray is made of Premium quality Plastic. It is lightweight but still very durable and 100% food-safe for children's use.
SAFE FOR KIDS: This adorable Food tray is reusable and BPA-free making it safe for kids' meals.
description: From the manufacturer About Us Established in 1971 by chairman and co-founder Ronnie Pavey, Lesser & Pavey. By priding ourselves on fantastic quality at great value for money, our brand "The Leonardo Collection" has become renowned worldwide. We have exhibited at every Spring & Autumn Fair and continue to regularly exhibit at other Trade Shows. As well as continually developing our own ranges of Giftware & Housewares and working on bespoke projects for customers using the expertise of our in-house Design Team, we also license artwork from popular artists including The MacNeil Studio, Jennifer Rose. There's a huge range of Homeware, Ladies & Gents, Novelty and Souvenir gifts, plus seasonal lines for Birthdays, Christmas, Weddings and more. Whilst walking round, something is bound to catch your eye also which you might have otherwise missed.
